_comment_policy: --- EXL3 catalog (TabbyAPI / ExLlamaV3, opt-in tier). Every entry must be (1) PUBLIC, ungated HF repo, and (2) point to a directory containing actual EXL3 weights (model.safetensors + config + quantization_config). ---
_comment_branches: --- IMPORTANT: turboderp's EXL3 repos publish each bits-per-weight as a SEPARATE GIT BRANCH (`4.0bpw`, `6.0bpw`, `8.0bpw_H8`, etc.) rather than separate repos. The `main` branch typically holds only README.md — no model weights. The current LMForge resolver does NOT yet support per-revision pulls from a catalog shortcut. Until that lands (tracked: M4-followup-catalog-revisions), this catalog is intentionally empty. To use TabbyAPI today: ---
_comment_recommended: --- Recommended ungated EXL3 model repos (browse for branches you want):  turboderp/Qwen3-8B-exl3 · turboderp/Qwen3-32B-exl3 · turboderp/Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct-exl3 · turboderp/Mistral-Small-3.1-24B-Instruct-2503-exl3 · turboderp/gemma-3-27b-it-exl3 · turboderp/Qwen3-30B-A3B-exl3. Sweet-spot bpw: 6.0bpw for chat (matches GPTQ-int8 perplexity at ~75% the VRAM); 4.0bpw for tight VRAM. ---
